description_long: This is a rustic, two-tiered potting bench constructed primarily from weathered wood and metal, featuring a perforated lower shelf and a solid upper work surface. The desk is equipped with gardening tools, including a metal watering can, several small terracotta pots, and hand trowels, all arranged on the top shelf. The frame is reinforced with diagonal metal supports and the lower shelf is made of a metal grid, ideal for drainage and storage of gardening supplies. The surface shows signs of rust and wear, suggesting prolonged outdoor use. A metal spade hangs from a side hook, adding to the utilitarian design. The overall appearance is functional and robust, suitable for heavy-duty gardening tasks.
description: A weathered, two-tiered potting bench with a metal grid shelf, wooden frame, and gardening tools on top. The surface is rustic and shows signs of outdoor use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full work surface, gardening tools, pots, watering can, and the perforated lower shelf.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the desk, stacked pots, watering can, and the thickness of the wooden frame.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the upper shelf, the metal grid lower shelf, and the cross-bracing for stability.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the hanging spade, stacked pots, and the side profile of the desk's structure.
attribute_orientation: The user-facing side is the open front with the main work surface and accessible tools, while the back is reinforced and less accessible.
attribute_usage_context: gardening workbench for potting, planting, and organizing garden tools
